script:
#!/bin/bash
set +e
echo '=== before ==='
stat -c '%a %U:%G %n' /home/azureuser 2>&1
echo 'kaye groups:'; groups kaye 2>&1
echo 'heather groups:'; groups heather 2>&1
echo 'gabriel groups:'; groups gabriel 2>&1
echo '=== chmod 0711 /home/azureuser (world-traversable, not readable) ==='
chmod 0711 /home/azureuser
stat -c '%a %U:%G %n' /home/azureuser 2>&1
echo '=== verify kaye can now execute claude with her OWN credential ==='
runuser -u kaye -- bash -c 'echo "Answer with one word: hello" | timeout 60 /home/azureuser/.npm-global/bin/claude -p --model claude-opus-4-7 --dangerously-skip-permissions --append-system-prompt "You are a test bot. Reply briefly." 2>&1' | head -10
echo '=== same for heather ==='
runuser -u heather -- bash -c 'echo "Answer with one word: hello" | timeout 60 /home/azureuser/.npm-global/bin/claude -p --model claude-opus-4-7 --dangerously-skip-permissions --append-system-prompt "You are a test bot. Reply briefly." 2>&1' | head -10
echo '=== same for gabriel ==='
runuser -u gabriel -- bash -c 'echo "Answer with one word: hello" | timeout 60 /home/azureuser/.npm-global/bin/claude -p --model claude-opus-4-7 --dangerously-skip-permissions --append-system-prompt "You are a test bot. Reply briefly." 2>&1' | head -10
echo '=== verify mskai (azureuser) still works ==='
runuser -u azureuser -- bash -c 'echo "Answer with one word: hello" | timeout 60 /home/azureuser/.npm-global/bin/claude -p --model claude-opus-4-7 --dangerously-skip-permissions --append-system-prompt "You are a test bot." 2>&1' | head -10
echo '===END==='
